items.title: Bessent says 'many' U.S. allies have asked for currency swaps amid Iran war turbulence
items.description: The White House on Tuesday said the UAE had not requested a currency swap line.

items.title: Trump administration discussing currency swap line with United Arab Emirates
items.description: Such a move would provide liquidity in dollars to the oil-rich UAE, but could be politically tenuous for the administration amid higher prices at home...
